title: Backend: Form Response Module (Data Model, CRUD, Formula Values)
description: Create a new backend module modules/form-response/ implementing the form response data model and API. This includes: Form Response Group CRUD (create, read, list, update), Form Response CRUD scoped to a group, Question Response CRUD with per-answer persistence, Formula value storage and computation service that evaluates registered formulas from responses, Schema validation and payload integrity checks on all write endpoints, and versioned references to form/section/question definitions at time of filling. Reference models: design/definitions/form_response/ files. Implements REQ-18 (Form Response Data Persistence). Mitigates TMITIG-5 (HTTPS Enforcement and Payload Integrity — backend schema validation part).

statusHistory.comment: Planning phase initiated for form-response module implementation
Implementation plan prepared and ready for review

changeHistory.comment: Reverted to Draft — only TASK-20 should be in review
